strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement with GISCollective and testing libraries
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack components not clearly demonstrated
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong open-source contributions, and direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure — highly aligned with the role. However, the severe discrepancy between the named candidate (Aisha Okonkwo) and all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan) raises serious concerns about resume authenticity, which outweighs technical strengths despite robust experience with key technologies.
